name: Luminous Supreme (70B)
license: Proprietary (Aleph Alpha API Terms & Conditions, SaaS-only)
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only autoregressive transformer with rotary position embeddings
note: Germany's first large-scale sovereign LLM; API-only 70B flagship of the original Luminous family, now a legacy offering behind PhariaAI.
verificationNotes: Release date (Aleph Alpha press release, April 14, 2022, Heidelberg) and 70B parameter count for the Supreme tier of the 13B/30B/70B Luminous family confirmed via multiple independent sources (innFactory, CRFM Stanford FMTI report). Dense decoder-only transformer with rotary position embeddings architecture confirmed. 2048-token context length confirmed as the legacy Luminous spec. Pricing of $175 input / $192.5 output per 1M tokens confirmed by fetching cloudprice.net directly - matches exactly. Deprecated/legacy status is consistent with Aleph Alpha's late-2024 pivot away from marketing Luminous to new customers in favor of PhariaAI/Pharia-1.
